title: Pasabahce 500ml Pub Glass Beer Mugs with Handle - 16x Large Classic German Stein Tankard Pint Glasses Birthday Fathers Day Gift Drinking Cup Set for Craft Ale, Lager
features: Add some authentic Anatolian style to your drinking glassware collection with these Pub Beer Mugs from Pasabahce.

Founded in 1935 on the banks of the Bosphorus Strait in Istanbul, Pasabahce has grown from a humble glassware manufacturer to one of the leading global names in the design and development of all types of domestic and industrial glass products.
These Pub Glasses follow in that proud tradition, with a clean-cut silhouette that make for a drinks serving staple in both the home and professional establishments alike.

The classic tankard styling provides a striking, traditional alternative to the standard bar beer glass, with a sturdy moulded handle providing a secure grip and a large 500ml capacity offering ample room for filling with your favourite craft ale, lager or pilsner.
Dimensions: Capacity: 500ml Diameter: 8.5cm Width (inc. Handle): 12.5cm Height: 13.5cm
